Container.Name: FireSight
Container.Overview:
FireSight is a self-hosted firewall log analyzer and syslog dashboard for UniFi routers (UDR / UDM / UXG / Cloud Gateway).
Acts as a syslog server on UDP/514, parses UniFi firewall, STA-tracker and internal events, enriches them with GeoIP and threat intelligence (AbuseIPDB + offline FireHOL/Spamhaus blocklists), and serves a fast dark NOC-style web UI with FTS5-backed search.
Single container — no separate database, no extra services. SQLite (WAL + FTS5) keeps searches snappy even on large log volumes.
Features: - Syslog UDP/514 listener with UniFi RFC3164 + CEF parser - Real-time firewall log viewer with pause/resume, country + ASN, threat level - Internal events viewer (Wi-Fi roam, auth, DHCP, admin actions) in plain English - Full-text search across raw syslog (SQLite FTS5) - Per-minute event charts driven by the global time range - Pie charts for actions, categories, and external IP threat level - Optional UniFi API polling (read-only) for client name resolution - Configurable retention by age + DB size cap, hourly VACUUM - First-login forced password change, session cookie auth - Local timezone support via the TZ env var (router timestamps lack a TZ field)
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: unifi syslog firewall log analyzer udr udm ubiquiti security network noc
Container.Requires: A UniFi router (UDR/UDM/UXG/Cloud Gateway) configured to send remote syslog to this container on UDP/514. Optional: a read-only UniFi local user for API polling.
Container.Changes: ### 2026-06-28 - First Unraid Community Apps release of FireSight - Firewall, internal, events, logs and raw-syslog views - GeoIP + AbuseIPDB + offline threat-feed enrichment - SQLite FTS5 search, retention by age + DB size, VACUUM scheduler

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the FireSight web UI. Host networking is used so this also binds on the host.

Config.Name: Syslog UDP Port
Config.Description: UDP port the syslog listener binds to. Point your UniFi router's remote syslog here.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent storage. Holds the SQLite database (unifi.db) and config.json (UniFi credentials, retention settings, auto-generated session secret).

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for interpreting UniFi syslog timestamps (RFC3164 has no TZ field). Must match the timezone your router is configured in.

Config.Name: Default Admin User
Config.Description: Seed username for the first login. You'll be forced to change the password on first login.

Config.Name: Default Admin Password
Config.Description: Seed password for the first login (forced change on first login).

Config.Name: Retention Days (Syslog)
Config.Description: Drop syslog rows older than N days. Can also be changed from Settings in the UI.

Config.Name: Max DB Size (MB)
Config.Description: Hard cap on on-disk SQLite size. When exceeded, the oldest syslog rows are pruned to fit.
